title: Tesserae widget marketplace index
description: Shape of widgets.json in the catalog repo (e.g. dmellok/tesserae-widgets). See docs/contracts/marketplace.md for the prose contract.

version.description: Bump on breaking changes to this index shape. Host rejects unknown index versions.

id.description: Catalog id. For widgets and fonts this is also the plugin folder name. Must be unique across the catalog and must not collide with a bundled plugin. Hyphens are allowed (widely used in theme ids); underscores remain canonical for widget/font folders.

description.description: One-line pitch shown on the Browse card. Keep it tight; the widget's own README is for long-form.

icon.description: Phosphor icon class. Optional; falls back to ph-puzzle-piece if absent.

tags.description: Used by the Browse filter chips. New tags need a host bump (intentional friction; keeps the taxonomy small).

kind.description: Catalog-installable kinds. Widgets and fonts land in plugins/<id>/ via the same drop-a-folder loader. Themes ship a two-file tarball (theme.json + theme.css) that lands in data/themes/community/<id>/ and gets mounted via the GET /themes/community.css endpoint. Renderers + devices stay bundled.

tesserae_compat.description: Same shape as plugin.json's field. Host filters the Browse list against its major version.

official.description: Set to true ONLY for entries whose source repo is owned by the catalog maintainer. The Browse page shows a shield badge.

screenshot_sizes.description: Sizes contributed under screenshots/<id>/<size>.png in the catalog repo. Must include 'lg'; CI rejects entries that don't ship the lg thumbnail.

extra_screenshot_count.description: Optional. When > 0, the catalog also ships screenshots/<id>/extra-<n>.png for n=1..count (same 3:2 lg-size shape as the primary screenshot). The Browse card renders all N+1 shots as a carousel; entries omitting this field render exactly as before.

folders.description: Informational: the plugin folders this entry will install. The marketplace auto-detects the layout from the tarball (single-widget or bundle-of-subfolders); when this field is present, the install path additionally verifies the tarball matches exactly. Used by widget families that pair a `_core` admin plugin with one or more display widgets, e.g. ['github_core', 'github_releases', 'github_actions']. Omit for single-widget entries (the folder is just `id`); the Browse card surfaces this list so users see what's about to land.

sha256.description: Hex sha256 of the tarball at tarball_url. Verified on install; mismatch hard-fails.

source.description: Public source URL (GitHub repo, etc.) shown on the Browse card so users can read the code before installing.
